2297430.name: Alien Garden
2297430.description:
Alien Garden brings you a legion of playable character classes in this challenging survival fantasy roguelike. Explore a wide variety of dungeons, discover unique weapons, collect magical items, cooperate with friends and level up to become more and more powerful.

Where life once flourished vibrantly, the great Alien Gardens now suffer under the oppressive reign of the mad gods. A group of unlikely heroes emerges, fated to confront the ruthless reign of The Mad King. Even amidst the throes of insanity, hope blossoms, for the world can still be made whole.
2297430.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
